title: Telangana-US steps Towards AI and clean energy : Telangana Deputy CM Bhatti Vikramarka
description: ಹೈದರಾಬಾದ್​ ಮತ್ತು ಅಮೆರಿಕದ ಸಂಬಂಧ ಕೇವಲ ಎರಡು ಸರ್ಕಾರಗಳ ನಡುವಿನ ರಾಜತಾಂತ್ರಿಕ ಸಂಬಂಧಕ್ಕೆ ಸೀಮಿತವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ಡಿಸಿಎಂ ವಿಕ್ರಮಾರ್ಕ ತಿಳಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.

title: Anthropic Launches Claude Tag, Bringing AI Teammates Into Slack Conversations
description: Anthropic has introduced a new enterprise feature called Claude Tag that allows its AI assistant to participate directly in workplace conversations, moving beyond the traditional chatbot model of responding only when prompted. Integrated into Slack, the feature enables employees to invite Claude into discussions using an @Claude mention. Once added to a conversation, the AI [...] The post Anthropic Launches Claude Tag, Bringing AI Teammates Into Slack Conversations appeared first on The CSR Journal .

title: How enterprise data management is evolving for the AI era
description: Enterprises are evolving data management to support AI integration into business operations. The shift from traditional data systems to AI-ready architectures emphasises the need for meaningful context and real-time access to diverse data sources while addressing governance and digital sovereignty.

title: TerraMaster F4-425 Pro review: an octa-core Intel NAS that ships with AI (OpenClaw)
description: The newest in the series ships with the brand new TOS 7, OpenClaw. It's powered by the very capable Intel N350 CPU, along with 16 GB of DDR5 memory. There's also a slightly cheaper model. Read more...

title: NetApp Enhances Support for AI Workloads at Massive Scale
description: StorageGRID 12.1 delivers up to 12TB/s throughput and massive scale for AI workloads NetApp® , the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, announced the release of StorageGRID 12.1, designed to help customers scale AI and other modern workloads with a federated global namespace. The new capabilities improve how data is accessed, processed, and managed across distributed environments [...] The post NetApp Enhances Support for AI Workloads at Massive Scale appeared first on AiThority .
